real_questions: What contingent liquidity access do you have?
How concentrated is your deposit base, and what share is insured versus uninsured?
What percentage of your deposits are insured, and what level of uninsured deposits are you unwilling to go below?
What are your deposit beta assumptions if rates rise, and how do they compare to the last cycle?
If discount window capacity becomes includable in liquidity ratios, do you intend to run with less liquidity as a result?
How is your securities portfolio constructed, and how liquid are those assets under stress?
agency_intel: Deposit concentration and the insured/uninsured split are legacy-SVB questions that surface in essentially any bank meeting, Fitch included.
